name: kanban-pro
description: Full-stack Kanban board application with Laravel API and React frontend

brain.role: Orchestrator — receives user tasks, plans work, delegates to hands, reviews output

hands.role: Coder — executes specific implementation tasks (write code, fix bugs, run builds)

slack.scheme: Threaded replies in a single channel; each task gets a thread

deployment.backend: Laravel 12, served via `php artisan serve` on port 8000
deployment.frontend: React + Vite, served via `npm run dev` on port 5173
